chart_map.name: 01_eval_scorecard
chart_map.question: Which policy/checkpoint is best?
chart_map.takeaway: Base model is strongest; final LoRA collapses to 3.13%, while best LoRA is step 2000 at 28.13%.
chart_map.title: Evaluation summary table

chart_map.name: 02_checkpoint_accuracy_ci
chart_map.question: Did training improve over time?
chart_map.takeaway: LoRA accuracy degrades after step 2000; final checkpoint is not the best model.
chart_map.title: Checkpoint-wise evaluation accuracy

chart_map.name: 03_reward_kl_timeline
chart_map.question: Are reward, KL, loss, clipfrac, and eval rates stable?
chart_map.takeaway: Small multiples show the late degradation without mixing incompatible scales.
chart_map.title: Core training metrics

chart_map.name: 04_response_health
chart_map.question: Does the model still produce parseable answers?
chart_map.takeaway: Empty/parse-failure indicators rise late, matching the final accuracy collapse.
chart_map.title: Response health metrics

chart_map.name: 05_grpo_health
chart_map.question: Is the group-relative learning signal healthy?
chart_map.takeaway: Reward diversity, zero-std rate, advantage spread, and group correctness are recorded separately.
chart_map.title: GRPO health metrics

chart_map.name: 06_reward_components
chart_map.question: Which reward terms drove behavior?
chart_map.takeaway: Correctness and format-shaping reward components are separated for auditability.
chart_map.title: Reward component metrics

chart_map.name: 07_trace_examples_table
chart_map.question: What does the model actually say?
chart_map.takeaway: Qualitative traces reveal concrete failure modes behind the aggregate metrics.
chart_map.title: Representative rollout examples

chart_map.name: 08_failure_taxonomy
chart_map.question: Which failures dominate the sampled rollouts?
chart_map.takeaway: Wrong numeric answers dominate, with late response/parse failures explaining collapse.
chart_map.title: Failure taxonomy from rollout traces

chart_map.name: 09_training_runtime
chart_map.question: How long did the observed training timeline take?
chart_map.takeaway: TensorBoard wall-time gives a reproducible runtime estimate and checkpoint I/O context.
chart_map.title: Training runtime and checkpoint I/O

chart_map.name: 10_metric_snapshot_table
chart_map.question: What are the latest/min/max/count values for tracked metrics?
chart_map.takeaway: The metric snapshot records latest value and observed range for every report-selected scalar.
chart_map.title: Selected scalar metric snapshot
